positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial floral pattern featuring entwined moon phases, delicate constellations, and exaggerated watercolor blooms. The composition is central, featuring clean, thick line art overlaying soft, deep indigo and burnt orange washes. Strong contrast is essential. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by esoteric cartography and botanical etchings, suitable for a repeating, graphic apparel print. Studio shot, deep focus, elegant silhouette, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, lowres, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, ugly, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped
